violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Splatter visible at customer side Plexi glass behind meat slicer. -Some splatter at customer soda dispenser, small spills below condiment dispensers (easily from today's lunch service). -Debris/spill at bottom interior of make line. -Unused slicer in storage still has food debris present on surfaces.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Some dust/debris above drive through monitor. -Single use bags/napkins/packaging at floor along make line. *COS-swept up while on-site.
